contexts.context: …proposal feels intuitive to me. When I have a <mark>compound</mark> key, or something that would in other contexts…
…something that would in other contexts be called a <mark>compound</mark> key, I tend to use nested maps.…
…if you had a sequence of arrays, a <mark>compound</mark> FLOWR expression would be better.
…we use variables for handling these things? Forming <mark>compound</mark> records from variables, or make the records extensible…
…for some feedback from RD about laziness on a <mark>compound</mark> structure.
